title: Only Paxel
description: Paxel mod is a mod that allows you to craft a tool which you can use as a pickaxe, axe or shovel
body:
# ![Only Paxel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/468045561ec149259074c319d32451a65f1909f1.gif) Only Paxel ![Only Paxel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/468045561ec149259074c319d32451a65f1909f1.gif)

Paxel mod allows you to craft a tool which can be used as a pickaxe, axe and shovel, starting from wooden till netherite paxels

## ![Only Paxel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/468045561ec149259074c319d32451a65f1909f1.gif) Paxels Stats:

![Paxels Stats](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/30251eb020424c46eeb3a9c19634fb060ad06d80_0.webp)

![Wooden Paxel Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/db912e6b35e48ea7350e9d7133b1e2468a9698bf.png)
![Stone Paxel Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bd99c650925eb4b948491d3de2e9ab74d19c7963.png)
![Iron Paxel Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/592a34151789f6dee182967dcee0fa4714a928ac.png)
![Gold Paxel Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec330f5351c01cad799f4e98143c13fc50bf273c.png)
![Diamond Paxel Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c45dcd2d7fdbe99dc8aea1ea6f92d8cad16fb0c4.png)
![Netherite Paxel Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b4ac31b2052bfff84b8e4f2cdc16fa32f7b7516a.png)

## ![Paxels](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0275b58651c76b411e6f4bca283896e0557e6d32.png)
## ![Paxel Creative Tab](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/225ba3d64bccf26ee3b3064aa186d925feb52f21.png)
## ![Paxels Advancements](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19852e56ba6f636b1cac1f1099ae91e1a9df963a.png)

### Changelog:

4.5.0 Fix some paxels values and upgrades a little the In-Game description

4.0.0 Changes slightly textures and adds an in-game description of the mod

3.5.0 Fix wooden paxel, redisigns slightly paxels textures and adds spanish traduction

3.0.0 Changes slightly some textures on paxels

2.5.0 Adds two new paxels (Wood and Stone), and change two achievments adding two more

2.0.0 Adds achivements and a little redesign

1.5.0 Upgrades paxels
